title: send_payment_message refuses to fall back to plaintext on MLS failure
description: When MLS encryption fails, send_payment_message prints an error and returns true (channel alive) without sending the message. It does NOT fall back to sending plaintext. This is the correct security posture for payment negotiation — the address and session ID in the message must not transit the relay in cleartext. A contributor might suggest 'fall back to plaintext so the user experience is not broken'. Do not do that. Payment plaintext in a broadcast message is visible to every room member and to anyone who can read relay logs.
close_reason: Already implemented correctly in the existing code
